actionCalls.description: Sends a custom in-app notification to the Opportunity Owner, linking to the stagnant Opportunity record.
actionCalls.name: Send_Custom_Notification
actionCalls.label: Send Custom Notification

actionCalls.description: Resolves the email recipient list based on the Opportunity's access classification by querying the appropriate Public Group. Normal opps route to the owner only; Restricted and Top Secret opps route to the matching group members.
actionCalls.name: Resolve_Email_Recipients
actionCalls.label: Resolve Email Recipients

actionCalls.description: Sends a logged email alert with stagnation details. Recipients resolved by OpportunityEmailRouter based on the Opportunity's access classification. The email is saved as an activity on the Opportunity record.
actionCalls.name: Send_Email
actionCalls.label: Send Email

assignments.description: Initialises varT_recipientIds with the Opportunity OwnerId as a single-element collection, ready for the in-app notification action.
assignments.name: ASG_InitRecipient
assignments.label: ASG Init Recipient

assignments.description: Resolves the varTT_NotificationTitle and varTT_NotificationBody text templates into the varT_notifTitle and varT_notifBody string variables consumed by the notification and email actions.
assignments.name: ASG_ComposeNotification
assignments.label: ASG Compose Notification

decisions.description: Checks whether a stagnation threshold record exists in custom metadata for the Opportunity current stage. If no threshold is configured for this stage the record is skipped without sending any notifications.
decisions.name: DEC_ThresholdConfigured
decisions.label: Threshold Configured For Stage

decisions.description: Evaluates whether the Opportunity has been in its current stage for at least as many days as the configured threshold. Records below the threshold exit without generating notifications.
decisions.name: DEC_IsStagnant
decisions.label: Stage Is Stagnant

Flow.description: Scheduled daily flow that processes all open Opportunities with a LastStageChangeDate__c populated. For each record it looks up the stagnation threshold from Opportunity_Stage_Stagnation_Threshold__mdt for the current stage, evaluates whether the Opportunity has exceeded that threshold, then sends a custom in-app notification to the owner and a logged email routed via OpportunityEmailRouter based on the Opportunity's access classification.

formulas.description: Calculates the number of whole calendar days the Opportunity has been in its current stage by subtracting LastStageChangeDate__c from today's date.
formulas.name: fxN_DaysInStage

formulas.description: Builds a Lightning Experience record URL for the Opportunity by appending the record Id to the org enterprise server base URL, producing a clickable deep link for the email body.
formulas.name: fxT_recordUrl

Flow.label: Opportunity - ScheduledFlow - NotifyStageStagnation

recordLookups.description: Retrieves the Opportunity_Owner_Alerts custom notification type record to obtain its Id for the Send Custom Notification action.
recordLookups.name: Get_Custom_Notification_Type
recordLookups.label: Get Custom Notification Type

recordLookups.description: Retrieves the Opportunity_Stage_Stagnation_Threshold__mdt record matching the Opportunity current StageName. Sets the result to null if no threshold is configured for this stage, causing DEC_ThresholdConfigured to skip notification.
recordLookups.name: Get_Stagnation_Threshold
recordLookups.label: Get Stagnation Threshold

textTemplates.description: Body content for the stagnation in-app notification and email. Includes stage, days in stage versus threshold, key Opportunity fields, suggested next actions from the CMT record, and a direct record link.
textTemplates.name: varTT_NotificationBody

textTemplates.description: Title for the stagnation in-app notification and subject line for the email alert. Surfaces the Opportunity name and current stage so the owner immediately identifies the affected record.
textTemplates.name: varTT_NotificationTitle

variables.description: Resolved notification body string, assigned from varTT_NotificationBody by ASG_ComposeNotification and passed to both the custom notification and email actions.
variables.name: varT_notifBody

variables.description: Resolved notification title string, assigned from varTT_NotificationTitle by ASG_ComposeNotification and passed to both the custom notification and email actions.
variables.name: varT_notifTitle

variables.description: Single-element Text collection containing the Opportunity OwnerId. Passed to the Send Custom Notification action as the target recipient list.
variables.name: varT_recipientIds

variables.description: Comma-separated email address string returned by OpportunityEmailRouter. Owner email for normal Opportunities; group members' emails for Restricted and Top Secret Opportunities.
variables.name: varT_routedEmailAddresses
